scenarios.title: Agent refresh performs sourced online research

gherkin.given: valid config and a clean payload-owned path for one manual refresh
gherkin.when: the research agent performs current online research across all six configured categories
gherkin.then: every category has eligible evidence or an explicit attempted-source unknown, every material claim resolves, and the valid proposal remains uncommitted

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-001 researched payload exposes six truthful categories and no fixture authority

gherkin.given: the real static server returns HTTP 404 for the closed missing-config fixture path
gherkin.when: the production boot sequence resolves and validates configuration
gherkin.then: the visible truth band names INVALID CONFIGURATION and PSRM-CONFIG-FETCH, no payload request occurs, and no substitute output renders

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-002 missing configuration blocks payload fetch and every output

scenarios.title: A valid stale payload remains visibly stale

gherkin.given: checked-in fixture contracts validate and the explicit fixture clock is after staleAfter
gherkin.then: both show the same STALE word, age, and threshold, the owner read stays stale, and no text calls the research current or live

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-003 stale research stays stale in Simple Power and owner read

scenarios.title: An invalid payload produces no conclusion

gherkin.given: fixture configuration is valid and the checked-in invalid payload has a dangling source reference and missing required category
gherkin.when: the extracted production validator and production page process it
gherkin.then: PSRM-PAYLOAD-REF and PSRM-PAYLOAD-CATEGORY are visible and no thesis, projection, deterministic result, or numeric owner metric is produced

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-004 invalid payload produces errors and no conclusion

scenarios.title: User shock levers recompute without research fetch

gherkin.given: one valid view model rendered from real same-origin fixture reads
gherkin.when: the user changes year, scenario, market, purchase, leverage, rate, and expense controls
gherkin.then: one production compute emits a synchronous result, research digests remain unchanged, and zero requests occur after initial contract reads

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-005 levers recompute synchronously with zero post-boot requests

scenarios.title: Demand and supply shocks obey the bounded occupancy equation

gherkin.given: base occupancy is 0.40, demand delta is 0.10, and supply delta is 0.25
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeAdjustedOccupancy function runs
gherkin.then: the exact clamped equation result is returned and an invalid denominator returns PSRM-MODEL-OCCUPANCY-DENOMINATOR with no number

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-006 occupancy equation clamps and rejects an invalid denominator

gherkin.given: paid managed-home occupancy and booked available-night OTA occupancy are both valid observations
gherkin.when: Power and the Source Inspector expose their evidence
gherkin.then: values and definitions remain separate, a DefinitionConflict names incompatibility, and no aggregate or conversion exists

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-007 incompatible occupancy definitions remain separate and unaggregated

scenarios.title: Buyer economics use standard amortizing debt service

gherkin.given: positive bound-valid purchase, leverage, annual-rate, and loan-term inputs
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeRentalModel function runs
gherkin.then: monthly payment uses standard amortization and annual debt, yield, expense, and cash flow share one unrounded result

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-008 buyer economics use standard amortization in one result

gherkin.given: positive principal, zero annual mortgage rate, and a positive integer payment count
gherkin.when: the extracted production computeMonthlyPayment function runs
gherkin.then: monthly payment equals principal divided by payments and annual debt service and cash flow remain finite

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-009 zero-rate financing stays finite

gherkin.given: gross revenue is lower than operating expense plus annual debt service
gherkin.when: Simple, Power, and the owner-read receipt render the shared result
gherkin.then: cash flow remains signed negative, NEGATIVE CASH FLOW precedes yield commentary, and no positive acquisition label appears

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-010 negative cash flow remains signed and explicit everywhere

scenarios.title: Mobile and desktop share one Simple and Power decision

gherkin.given: one valid fixture and one UserAssumptionSet
gherkin.when: the page renders at desktop and mobile sizes and switches Simple and Power
gherkin.then: truth, thesis, confidence, scenario, outputs, and digest match with no overflow, clipped focus, pointer-only control, or chart/table mismatch

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-011 desktop mobile Simple Power decisions stay identical

scenarios.title: Every material claim is source traceable

gherkin.given: a displayed material claim has validated supporting source references
gherkin.when: the user opens and closes the native Source Inspector
gherkin.then: every reference resolves with scope, period, access, rights, and limitations, text and links stay safe, and focus returns exactly

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-012 source inspector resolves provenance and restores exact focus

scenarios.title: Previous-refresh changes require a prior payload

gherkin.given: a valid compared test payload names the immediately prior valid payload identity
gherkin.when: extracted production change validation and the real page process it
gherkin.then: every material entity has exactly one change record and every scenario or acquisition revision has sourced reasoning

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-013 compared refresh accounts for every material entity

scenarios.title: First refresh invents no change history

gherkin.given: the initial researched payload has no prior valid predecessor
gherkin.when: payload validation and the Change Ledger process baseline mode
gherkin.then: prior identity fields are null, changes are empty, and no prior-relative directional claim appears

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-014 baseline refresh invents no prior change

scenarios.title: Failed research never becomes fabricated data

gherkin.given: one required source in the labeled failed-source fixture is inaccessible
gherkin.when: production validation and the real page process that category
gherkin.then: the source remains an unverified attempt without a value, the category stays unknown, and it cannot support a thesis metric or forecast

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-015 inaccessible research remains unknown without a value

scenarios.title: Observed forecast and inference remain distinct

gherkin.given: claims and series contain observed, forecast, and inference classifications
gherkin.when: Simple, Power, chart, table, and Source Inspector render
gherkin.then: each item exposes one word and non-color mark, method/input lineage resolves, and user outputs use MODELED FROM USER ASSUMPTIONS

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-016 observed forecast inference and modeled outputs stay distinct

scenarios.title: Legal supply does not silently become active supply

gherkin.given: the payload contains certificates, caps, waitlist, and OTA active-listing observations
gherkin.when: Power evidence and the Simple supply control render
gherkin.then: legal facts, marketplace observations, and supply assumptions remain separate and no certificate-to-listing conversion exists

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-017 legal and active supply remain separate from scenario assumptions

scenarios.title: Owner read preserves unavailable and stale states

gherkin.given: the registered tool renders current, stale, unavailable, or invalid-input state
gherkin.when: it publishes its strict owner read and Market Brief consumes registry coverage
gherkin.then: state, direction, confidence, scenario, and caveat remain faithful, invalid numerics are omitted, and the consumer deep-links without copying research or equations

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-018 registered owner read preserves current stale unavailable and omissions

gherkin.given: all Feature 005 implementation and consumer scopes are complete
gherkin.when: the full Node, validator, static-page, Playwright, and governance checks execute from the repository root
gherkin.then: every protected scenario has a real non-silent assertion, fixtures are not market proof, and every finding is fixed and revalidated

linkedTests.testId: Regression: SCN-005-019 complete Palm Springs protected matrix remains executable
